name: UOB Kay Hian Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: UOB Kay Hian Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited engages in the securities brokerage, dealing, and derivatives business in Thailand. The company operates in three segments: Securities and Derivatives Business, Financial Advisory Business, and Investing Business. It offers securities brokerage, trading, and underwriting, derivatives agent, securities borrowing and lending, and investment advisory service. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. UOB Kay Hian Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of UOB-Kay Hian Holdings Limited.
